intent: Snapshot has object attrs in reversed order (ftype=text/plain dir=/a/) vs current (dir=/a/ ftype=text/plain). Canonical predicate is identical (object side is an order-insensitive conjunction per f2 section 4.1). Expected drift: EMPTY. RED against current impl because row_key uses source-order render, not canonical_grant_key.

oracle.method: f2 section 4.1 canonical predicate equality: predicate side is order-insensitive conjunction; reordering object attrs must not produce drift
oracle.grounding: canonical_grant_key in register.rs sorts attr pairs; row_key must use canonical_grant_key not source-order render
